name: Paralytic Lick
outcome: [AttackerName] lashes out with [AttackerHisOrHer] long sinuous tongue, licking the length of [TargetName]'s body, making [TargetHimOrHer] shiver at the pleasant sensation before the tongue recoils back to [AttackerName]'s mouth.
miss: [AttackerName] lashes out with [AttackerHisOrHer] long sinuous tongue, but [TargetName] manages to move out of the way of [AttackerHisOrHer] lewd lick, leaving the tongue to recoil back to [AttackerHisOrHer] mouth.
statusOutcome: [TargetName] body starts to feel increasingly numb and unresponsive as [AttackerName]'s paralytic venom seeps into [TargetHisOrHer] skin...
